message: fix: Add concurrency settings to CI configuration

files.patch:
@@ -9,6 +9,11 @@ on:
 env:
   ZIG_VERSION: "0.15.2"
 
+
+concurrency:
+  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
+  cancel-in-progress: true
+
 jobs:
   # =============================================================================
   # Build & Unit Tests
